---
title: "Joint species distribution model on the presence-only data of crop wild relatives "
output: github_document
---

Code directory:

- `clean_CWR.R`: R script to clean the coordinate data from GBIF (in progress)
- `bioclim_soilgrids.R`: R script to retrieve climatic and soil predictors
- `phylo_CWR.R`: R script to retrieve phylogeny of the wild relatives
